hook.text: does endow in the pouch, don't let's get worse over time.
hook.emotional_mechanism_raw: curiosity, personal relevance for endometriosis patients
hook.target_audience_raw: endometriosis patients, those recently diagnosed with POD endo

main_claim.text: Endometriosis in the Pouch of Douglas (POD) can get worse over time if not managed or if it doesn't respond well to surgery.

supporting_explanation.summary: All endometriosis material, irrespective of location, can progress if unmanaged or treatment-resistant.

funnel_rationale: Broad educational claim about disease progression; no mention of diagnosis steps, treatment options, or booking. Aimed at raising awareness.

topic.primary_raw: Endometriosis progression in Pouch of Douglas
